title: Enterprise E-Commerce Microservices — Project Architecture Memory
description: Comprehensive single-file reference of the entire microservices architecture: 7 services (Config Server, Discovery Server, API Gateway, Auth, Product, Inventory, Order), their entities, endpoints, inter-service Feign communication flows, RBAC rules, database schemas, shared common library modules, Docker Compose setup, configuration properties, and coding conventions. Designed for instant agent lookup without re-analysing the full project tree.
